answer:
The series telescopes:  
\[
\sum_{n=1}^\infty \left( \cos\left(\frac{1}{n^2}\right) - \cos\left(\frac{1}{(n+1)^2}\right) \right) = \cos(1) - \lim_{n\to\infty} \cos\left(\frac{1}{(n+1)^2}\right) = \cos(1) - 1.
\]  
Since \(\cos(1) \approx 0.5403\), the sum is approximately \(-0.4597\), which matches option J.

\boxed{J}
